interpretation: Option C collapses to Option B when measured trajectory benefit cannot pay trajectory-specific queue, validation, and security costs
special_zero_denominator_behavior: not a ratio threshold; if trajectory benefit is missing because required fields are absent, measurement is invalid rather than zero

equation_text: Benefit_object_reuse + Benefit_branch_verifier_durable <= ObjectQueueCost + TrajectoryQueueCost + ValidationOverhead_total + ExpectedSecurityLoss_total
interpretation: Option C collapses to Option A when combined object plus trajectory retained value cannot pay all incremental overheads
special_zero_denominator_behavior: not a ratio threshold; unauthorized or stale replay contributes zero positive retained value

equation_text: (TrajectoryQueueCost + ValidationOverhead_trajectory + ExpectedSecurityLoss_trajectory - V_verifier - V_tool_replay - V_durable_workspace - V_trajectory_log) / (f * s_b * (C_branch_recompute + C_branch_loss))
interpretation: minimum branch survival needed for branch state to justify Option C, holding per-branch state value constant
special_zero_denominator_behavior: if denominator is zero, branch survival cannot justify Option C; if numerator is negative, non-branch trajectory value alone can justify Option C

equation_text: (TrajectoryQueueCost + ValidationOverhead_trajectory + ExpectedSecurityLoss_trajectory - V_branch - V_tool_replay - V_durable_workspace - V_trajectory_log) / (n_verifier_states * (C_validation_rerun + C_verifier_loss))
interpretation: minimum verifier reuse needed for verifier state to justify Option C, holding other terms constant
special_zero_denominator_behavior: if denominator is zero, verifier reuse cannot justify Option C; if numerator is negative, non-verifier trajectory value alone can justify Option C

equation_text: P_hit * P_valid_given_hit * C_recompute_avoided <= C_lookup + C_validation + C_recovery + E_C_wrong_reuse
interpretation: semantic-cache retained value is nonpositive after correctness validation and recovery costs
special_zero_denominator_behavior: if P_hit or P_valid_given_hit is zero then semantic-cache value is zero or unsafe
stale source version with invalidation signal must force revalidate or recompute

equation_text: P_safe_hit_after_tenant_salt * C_recompute_avoided <= C_lookup + C_validation + Q_registry + Q_policy
interpretation: tenant and cache-salt enforcement leaves insufficient safe retained value

interpretation: cache recovery overhead exceeds the exact baseline

interpretation: durable replay p95 exceeds retained recompute value

interpretation: durable replay tail misses verifier or merge deadline

interpretation: dependency fan-in tail amplification erases replay margin

interpretation: summary-pointer recovery is invalid or slower than recompute

interpretation: durable replay violates retention horizon without active hold
special_zero_denominator_behavior: expired retention forbids reuse independent of latency benefit

interpretation: RAG Option B collapses when provenance/freshness/isolation validation overhead exceeds object-reuse retained-value margin

interpretation: Option C collapses when trajectory provenance, authorization, verifier, and retention validation overhead exceeds branch/verifier/durable retained-value margin
special_zero_denominator_behavior: if unsafe-pass rate is nonzero, retained value is invalid regardless of low overhead; if no replay attempts exist, Option C has no provenance-supported benefit

equation_text: unsafe_pass_rate > 0 for any missing provenance, stale source, cache-salt mismatch, unauthorized replay, verifier-hash mismatch, expired retention, missing recovery pointer, or contaminated branch fixture
interpretation: unsafe reuse passing validation invalidates memory-centric retained-value credit before economics are considered
